headline: Is It Time To Reassess Broadcom (AVGO) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Broadcom's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this breakdown will help you put some structure around that question. The stock closed at US$310.51, with returns of a 3.6% decline over 7 days, a 6.7% decline over 30 days, a 10.7% decline year to date, but a 63.0% gain over 1 year and a very large 5 year return. This naturally raises questions about how much value is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage has focused on Broadcom's role...
